data.title: European Financial Entities Urge EU to Expedite DLT Pilot Review
data.description:
Nasdaq, Boerse Stuttgart Group, and 39 other signatories from fintech associations in France, Spain, Italy, Hungary, and Poland have called on the European Commission and the European Parliament to expedite the review of the 'Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT) Pilot Regime' by separating it from the broader 'Market Integration and Regulation Program.' According to Foresight News, the signatories argue that the lengthy negotiation process of the overall program poses a risk of Europe falling behind the United States in DLT applications.

In a letter to Financial Services Commissioner Maria Luis Albuquerque, the signatories requested the removal of asset class restrictions, an increase in the overall transaction volume cap to 150 billion euros, and the elimination of license time limits. The letter highlighted that the United States established a regulatory framework for stablecoins through the 'Genius Act' last year, rapidly gaining a leading position in the tokenized assets sector. The European Commission is currently pushing for a swift resolution of the entire regulatory program, viewing it as a crucial part of the Capital Markets Union plan. Financial Services Commissioner Maria Luis Albuquerque has previously emphasized the need for all legislative proposals to be passed simultaneously.

data.title: Liquid Capital Founder Reflects on Crypto Industry Insights Since 2015
data.description:
Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua shared his experiences since entering the crypto industry in 2015. According to Odaily, he emphasized the importance of strategic direction, timing, and risk management in the sector's development.

Yi highlighted the significance of choosing the right niche, such as exchanges, and noted that entering the market during a bear phase can help build long-term confidence. He advised against engaging in high-risk contract trading and stressed the importance of selecting reliable partners, maintaining physical and mental health, and continuously learning new technologies and opportunities.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 640 USDT with a 2.10% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 21, 2026, 10:47 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 640 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 640.119995 USDT, with a narrowed 2.10% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Lambda256 Partners with Crystal Intelligence for Digital Asset Compliance in South Korea
data.description: Lambda256 has entered into a business agreement with Crystal Intelligence to provide an integrated digital asset compliance solution in South Korea. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration aims to address the anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing requirements associated with digital assets. The partnership is expected to enhance regulatory compliance and security measures within the digital asset sector.

data.title: Yi Lihua: The key to the crypto industry lies in direction, timing, and risk management.
data.description: Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua summarized his experience since entering the crypto industry in 2015, emphasizing the importance of focusing on direction selection, entry timing, and risk management. He pointed out that choosing the right sector (such as exchanges) is crucial, and entering during a bear market helps build long-term confidence. He also stressed avoiding high-risk contract trading, paying attention to partner selection, maintaining mental and physical health, and continuously learning about new technologies and opportunities.

data.title: 3M Shares Rise 2% Pre-Market as Q1 Adjusted EPS Exceeds Expectations
data.description: 3M's stock saw a 2% increase in pre-market trading following the announcement of its first-quarter adjusted earnings per share (EPS) surpassing market expectations. According to Jin10, the company's financial performance in the first quarter has been stronger than anticipated, contributing to the positive movement in its stock price.

data.title: General Electric Exceeds Profit Expectations Amid Strong Air Travel Demand
data.description: General Electric reported first-quarter profits that surpassed Wall Street forecasts, driven by robust demand for air travel. Bloomberg posted on X that the jet-engine manufacturer managed to navigate disruptions linked to the ongoing conflict in Iran. The company's performance highlights resilience in the aviation sector despite geopolitical challenges. GE's ability to meet market expectations underscores the strength of its operations and the continued recovery in global travel.

data.title: AMD Develops MRM-Based CPO Solution for Next-Gen Instinct MI500 Accelerator
data.description: AMD announced plans to develop a Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) solution based on MRM technology for its upcoming Instinct MI500 accelerator. According to Jin10, the Photon Integrated Circuit (PIC) will be manufactured by GlobalFoundries, while ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. will handle the packaging process. This development marks a significant step in enhancing the performance and efficiency of AMD's accelerator technology.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Health Insurance Companies See Pre-Market Gains Following UnitedHealth's Strong Q1 Profit
data.description: U.S. health insurance companies experienced a rise in pre-market trading after UnitedHealth Group (UNH.N) reported first-quarter profits that exceeded expectations. According to Jin10, CVS Health shares increased by 3.3%, Elevance Health saw a 3.2% rise, Cigna's stock went up by 1.3%, Humana gained 2.9%, and Molina Healthcare rose by 3%. The positive earnings report from UnitedHealth appears to have bolstered investor confidence across the sector.

data.title: Vitalik: I suggest that Chinese-language developers combine their hardware advantages with open-source AI to explore new cross-disciplinary possibilities.
data.description: The inauguration ceremony of ETH HK Hub (Ethereum Community Hub Hong Kong), supported by the Ethereum Foundation, was held today in West Kowloon, Hong Kong. Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin and Ethereum Foundation Chairman Aya Miyaguchi attended and held a fireside chat with Hong Kong Legislative Council member Edward Yau. In his keynote speech, Vitalik suggested that Chinese-speaking developers return to the core principles of Ethereum, fully utilize hardware advantages, open-source AI talent, and ZK technology to explore new cross-domain applications. Vitalik pointed out that each wave of new technology is an opportunity for a new generation of developers to return to the same starting line as global leaders. The Chinese-speaking community can maintain forward-thinking in an rapidly changing world and drive the development of the entire ecosystem through innovative solutions. The opening of ETH HK Hub continues the Ethereum Foundation and Ethereum ecosystem's emphasis on the Asia-Pacific community and also signifies Hong Kong's key role in the global Ethereum landscape.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI and Anthropic Lead Forbes AI 50 List with Massive Funding and Revenue Growth
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Forbes released its AI 50 list, highlighting industry leaders such as OpenAI and Anthropic as dominant figures. According to Jin10, these AI giants have received unprecedented financial backing from top Silicon Valley venture capitalists and tech giants, and are reportedly preparing for significant IPOs. Together, OpenAI and Anthropic have raised a total of $242.6 billion, accounting for approximately 80% of the total $305.6 billion raised by companies on this year's AI 50 list. The widespread adoption of their products has driven strong revenue growth. As of the end of February, OpenAI's annualized revenue reportedly exceeded $25 billion, while Anthropic announced in early April that its revenue run rate had surpassed $30 billion. Both AI labs have made significant impacts in markets such as programming with products like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex.

data.title: Aave TVL decreased to $16.432 billion, with some of the funds flowing into Spark.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, funds continue to flow out of Aave, with some flowing into Spark. Data shows that Aave's TVL has dropped to $16.432 billion, a decrease of approximately $9.94 billion from the previous period; meanwhile, Spark's TVL has risen to $4.552 billion, an increase of approximately $825 million.

data.title: Justin Sun appeared online at the HTX Genesis Hackathon: AI Agents are the core driving force for Web3's move towards intelligence.
data.description: On April 21st, Justin Sun, Global Advisor of Huobi HTX, appeared online at the opening ceremony of the HTX Genesis Hackathon in Hong Kong and shared his latest assessment of the application prospects of AI Agent technology in the Web3 field and the future development direction of the industry. He pointed out that AI Agent will replace traditional interaction methods and become the core driving force of the next stage of the Web3 ecosystem. He explained that past Web3 applications were often accompanied by extremely high learning barriers and complex on-chain interactions, while the introduction of AI Agent will drive decentralized applications (DApps) to evolve from "manual operation" to "intention-driven" based on natural language. This means that AI Agent can autonomously understand user needs, automatically plan paths, and complete complex on-chain settlements such as cross-chain transactions. This paradigm shift of intelligence and autonomy will not only greatly unleash on-chain productivity, but will also become a new breakthrough point to break through the bottleneck of Web3 user growth and lead the industry towards true mass adoption. It is reported that the HTX Genesis Hackathon was hosted by HTX DAO and B.AI, and co-hosted by TinTinLand and OpenCity, attracting participation from numerous developer communities, investment institutions, project teams, trading platforms, and public blockchain ecosystems.

data.title: Rising Costs and Entitlement Concerns Heighten Retirement Worries for Americans
data.description: Americans are increasingly anxious about their financial security in retirement due to escalating living expenses and uncertainties surrounding entitlement programs. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting that these concerns are growing as inflation continues to impact household budgets and the future of Social Security and Medicare remains uncertain. Many individuals are reassessing their retirement plans, considering the potential need for increased savings or delayed retirement to ensure financial stability in their later years. The situation underscores the importance of addressing these economic challenges to alleviate the financial stress faced by future retirees.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank May Maintain Rates Amid Iran Conflict Uncertainty
data.description: Japan's central bank is likely to keep interest rates unchanged next week due to uncertainties stemming from the Iran conflict, according to informed sources. However, officials remain committed to raising borrowing costs in the near future. Despite the financial environment remaining relaxed, the bank may maintain its stance that benchmark rates must continue to rise as conditions allow, even if the April 28 decision keeps the overnight rate at 0.75%. This could increase the likelihood of action in June, provided economic conditions remain stable. Some officials are inclined to raise rates at the upcoming meeting, anticipating geopolitical shocks will drive prices higher. According to Jin10, another report earlier this month indicated that the Bank of Japan is also considering significantly raising its inflation forecast at this meeting. The officials added that they will closely monitor the U.S.-Iran conflict until the last moment before making a final policy decision.

data.title: Iran's Control Over the Strait of Hormuz: Implications and Solutions
data.description:
Iran has strategically positioned itself to exert control over the Strait of Hormuz, a critical maritime passage for global oil trade. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the geopolitical tensions surrounding this vital chokepoint. The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow waterway connecting the Persian Gulf with the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea, through which a significant portion of the world's oil supply is transported. Iran's influence over this region has raised concerns among global powers, particularly due to its potential to disrupt international trade.

The strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz cannot be overstated, as it serves as a conduit for approximately one-fifth of the world's oil shipments. Iran's military presence and its ability to potentially block or control passage through the strait have been a point of contention, leading to heightened tensions with other nations, especially the United States.

To address the situation, diplomatic efforts are necessary to ensure the free flow of trade through the strait. International cooperation and dialogue are crucial in mitigating the risks associated with Iran's control over this critical maritime route. The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to unimpeded trade would require a concerted effort from global powers to engage with Iran and address the underlying geopolitical issues.

In conclusion, the Strait of Hormuz remains a focal point of international concern due to its strategic significance in global oil trade. Resolving the tensions surrounding this chokepoint is essential for maintaining stability in the region and ensuring the uninterrupted flow of energy resources worldwide.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Morgan Stanley Revises Gold Price Forecast Amid Market Challenges
data.description: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its gold price target for the second half of 2026, lowering it to $5,200 per ounce from a previous optimistic projection of $5,700. According to NS3.AI, this revision follows an approximate 8% decline in gold prices since February 28. The bank attributes the diminished outlook to several factors, including increased real yields, selling by exchange-traded funds (ETFs), central bank sales, and postponed expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts. Morgan Stanley identifies the anticipated rate cuts by the Federal Reserve in September and December as key drivers for a potential recovery in gold prices.

data.title: UnitedHealth Exceeds Q1 Revenue and Earnings Expectations
data.description: UnitedHealth reported first-quarter revenue of $111.7 billion, surpassing market expectations of $109.57 billion. According to Jin10, the company's adjusted earnings per share for the first quarter were $7.23, exceeding the anticipated $6.57. UnitedHealth forecasts that its adjusted earnings per share for the full year will be higher than $18.25, compared to the market expectation of $17.86.

data.title: Czech PM Urges EU to Ease Environmental Rules Amid Energy Crisis
data.description: Czech Prime Minister Andrej Babis has urged the European Union to relax its environmental regulations in response to the energy price spikes resulting from the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Babis's call for action as energy costs continue to rise across Europe. The Prime Minister emphasized the need for immediate measures to mitigate the economic impact on EU member states. Babis's appeal comes amid growing concerns over energy security and economic stability in the region. The EU is currently facing pressure to balance its environmental commitments with the urgent need to address the energy crisis.

data.title: Iran has not yet decided whether to resume negotiations with the United States.
data.description: According to Iran's Press TV, Iran has stated that no decision has yet been made regarding resuming negotiations with the United States. (Jinshi)
